{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Shears of a previous Makiel
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Shears of a previous Makiel]] once snipped threads from [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
